question: BUG-057 reopen — diagnostic-only PR #424 needs operator merge/hold (Tier 2)
summary: PR #420 quantize_price IS firing (output reaches Bybit at 2 decimals) but Bybit STILL rejects spot SL/TP with 170134. PR #424 adds read-only diagnostic logging on every 170134 to capture live priceFilter/lotSizeFilter so the next failure tells us which fix to ship next. NO behaviour change to order path. 19/19 tests green.

question: S-047 plan review — Bybit Spot Margin on bybit_2 for VWAP true longs+shorts (Tier 3 multi-PR sprint, ~20h Claude + ≤30min operator)
summary: 2026-05-07 audit confirmed: VWAP signals fire every 15min, dispatch reaches bybit_2, but every sell refuses with below_min_balance because the today-#441 fix returns $0 BTC available on a USDT-only wallet. Operator directive: enable Spot Margin (isLeverage=1) so wallet holds USDT and opens long/short BTC spot positions, with RiskManager fully aware of margin/borrow fees/liquidation. PR #450 carries the diagnostic notebook + colab-workflows Rule 7 update + the S-047 sprint plan (7 checkpoints, 8 deliverables: ops notebook, accounts.yaml schema, RiskManager spot-margin sizing, exec.py + coordinator wiring, vwap.monitor close logic, reconciler spot-margin awareness, runbook). All deliverables are Tier 2/3, all draft, all ping-PR'd. T0 cannot start until this plan is merged/held. Smoke test plan included. Operator must also enable Spot Margin on the Bybit web UI before T1 starts (one toggle in Account → Margin Mode).

question: S-047 T1 (Tier 3) — declare bybit_2 spot-margin in routing config (PR #456)?
summary: D2 of S-047. config/accounts.yaml: bybit_2 market_type spot → spot-margin (extends existing routing field, no new is_leverage flag). src/units/accounts/risk.py: three new module-level defaults (max_borrow_btc=0.5, borrow_fee_apr_pct=10.0, liquidation_buffer_pct=30.0) exposed on RiskManager via config-dict-with-fallback — same surface as min_balance_usd / risk_pct. The label is identity, not a gate; dispatcher's live | dry_run remains the only canonical execution gate per workplan § Live / dry-run rule. T2 consumes the params; T3 consumes the label. § 4.4 5-bullet compliance check passes (no refuse-to-trade outside dispatcher; no per-account refusal flag; no operator-run notebook gate; live-mode invariant ✅; ruff/secret-scan/dry-run-in-diff/inventory clean; 21 new tests pass). Tier 3 — work-PR stays draft until operator merge reply.

question: S-047 T2 (Tier 3) — RiskManager spot-margin sizing kernel (PR #459)?
summary: D3 of S-047. RiskManager.position_size() upgraded with a spot-margin kernel: sizes from USDT collateral for both directions; max_borrow_btc as a sizing CAP; borrow_fee_apr_pct SCALES qty when daily fee accrual would bust the remaining daily-loss budget; liquidation_buffer_pct REFUSES (returns 0.0, same shape as min_balance_usd) when the SL distance violates the buffer relative to the liquidation distance implied by qty + USDT collateral. Long with no borrow (notional ≤ collateral) skips buffer — no leverage, no liquidation. Routing label passed as a primitive `market_type: str = "spot"` keyword arg; RiskManager does not inspect TradingAccount. Non-spot-margin sizing is bit-identical to pre-T2 contract (S-026 G2/G3 invariants pinned). 13 new tests across 3 classes; all pass. § 4.4 5-bullet compliance check ✅ (no refuse-to-trade outside dispatcher — zero-qty returns are existing risk-manager refusals; no per-account flag; no operator notebook; live-mode invariant clean; ruff/secret/dry-run/inventory clean). Tier 3 — work-PR stays DRAFT until operator merge reply gates T3.

title: S-047 T3 — exec + coordinator wiring (D4 + D5 land together)

question: S-047 T3 (Tier 2/3) — exec + coordinator spot-margin wiring (PR #464)?
summary: D4 + D5 of S-047 land together (one diff is incoherent without the other). D4: execute.py adds isLeverage=1 to every Bybit V5 spot place_order on bybit_2 (Buy + Sell + close legs); cash-spot accounts unchanged; existing spot-sell pre-flight base-coin guard SKIPPED for spot-margin (system can borrow). retCodes 110007/110095 flow through existing report_api_failure path — NO new gates. D5: coordinator returns USDT collateral as the balance for BOTH directions on spot-margin (cash-spot keeps direction-aware semantics); forwards market_type primitive to RiskManager.position_size so the T2 kernel actually fires. Fixes the live error operator just observed: bybit_2 Buy 0.002 BTC vs $177 USDT → 170131 (no isLeverage in kwargs). Operator side-quest (independent of this PR): flip the Bybit web-UI Spot Margin toggle on bybit_2 — until then, every isLeverage=1 order returns retCode 110007 server-side and is logged. Margin-agnostic — sprint does not block on the toggle. § 4.4 5-bullet compliance ✅: removes one refusal (spot-sell pre-flight for spot-margin), adds zero new gates; routing predicate not refusal flag; no operator notebook; live-mode clean; ruff/secret/dry-run/inventory clean; 25 new tests + 109 pre-existing related tests pass. Smoke harness scripts/sprint047/spot_margin_smoke.py runs against Bybit testnet (T6 territory). Tier 2/3 — DRAFT, never auto-merged, operator merge gates T4/T5/T6.

title: S-047 T3 closed — spot-margin exec+coordinator wiring live on bybit_2
summary: D4 + D5 merged 2026-05-07 (operator-approved with Bybit web-UI Spot Margin toggle already on). isLeverage=1 now lands on every place_order/close for bybit_2; coordinator returns USDT collateral as the balance for both directions; market_type primitive forwarded to RiskManager.position_size so the T2 spot-margin kernel actually fires. Live 170131 bug operator observed pre-merge (Buy 0.002 BTC vs $177 USDT) is fixed by this landing combined with the already-flipped web-UI toggle. T4 (vwap monitor close logic), T5 (reconciler spot-margin awareness), T6 (live smoke + runbook), T7 (sprint close) remain queued as separate sessions.
